channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Dodgers sign star out of Korean baseball league
item.description: If you thought the Los Angeles Dodgers would slow down on player signings because they already assembled a world champion roster, then you were wrong. According to the team on Friday, the Dodgers have added one of this offseason's most sought-after prizes: Korean star second baseman Hyeseong Kim.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Olympic sprinter arrested in Florida on alleged police battery incident: report
item.description: United States sprinter Fred Kerley was arrested in Miami Beach for alleged battery of a law enforcement official, NBC affiliate WTVJ reports.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dolphins' Tagovailoa 'unlikely' to play Sunday against Jets, Huntley in line for 2nd straight start
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Quarterback Tua Tagovailoa is expected to miss his second straight game when the Dolphins travel to face the New York Jets on Sunday in a matchup with playoff implications, coach Mike McDaniel said Friday.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CFP head tells ESPN that Cotton Bowl and Orange Bowl won't swap kickoff times, dates
item.description: The College Football Playoff won’t swap kickoff dates and times for the Cotton Bowl and Orange Bowl to give Notre Dame more time between games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Baker Mayfield's success in Tampa Bay has turned him into a coach-builder
item.description: Baker Mayfield revived his career in Tampa Bay and became a coach-builder in the process. Mayfield’s success with the Buccaneers in 2023 helped Dave Canales become head coach of the Carolina Panthers after just one season as an offensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Noval Djokovic beaten by big-serving Reilly Opelka in quarterfinals of Brisbane International
item.description: BRISBANE, Australia (AP) — Novak Djokovic was beaten 7-6 (6), 6-3 by big-serving Reilly Opelka in the Brisbane International quarterfinals on Friday. The 37-year-old Djokovic was playing his first tournament of the year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jets interview former Titans coach Mike Vrabel for their head coaching job
item.description: The New York Jets interviewed former Tennessee Titans coach Mike Vrabel for their head coaching vacancy.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: College football turns upside down, but this final four is a collection of the sport's big programs
item.description: In the first round of the College Football Playoff, the teams seeded 5-8 all won. In the second round, they all won again.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: St. Pete Pier hosts 'Raise the Flags Friday' ahead of Bucs' regular season finale
item.description: The Buccaneers are counting down to the finale of their regular season. Sunday's home game against the New Orleans Saints is a must-win for the team to secure a spot in the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rams QB Matthew Stafford gets home inspected amid string of NFL home burglaries
item.description: A string of high-profile burglaries at the homes of NFL players that has even prompted a warning from the FBI has led one of the brightest stars of Los Angeles to take a proactive approach to the issue.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Bears CB Jaylon Johnson earns team's lone Pro Bowl selection this season, his 2nd straight
item.description: Bears cornerback Jaylon Johnson has been selected to represent the NFC at the 2025 Pro Bowl Games, the NFL announced Thursday morning. The games will be held a week before the Super Bowl, on Sunday, Feb. 2, at Camping World Stadium in Orlando, Fla.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Allstate Sugar Bowl postponed
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Caesars Superdome was placed under lockdown Wednesday after a pickup truck drove into a New Year’s crowd about a mile away, killing at least 15 people and injuring dozens, city and federal officials said.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: LeBron James' youngest son Bryce commits to Arizona
item.description: Bryce James, son of NBA star LeBron James, is heading to Arizona. Bryce James announced his decision Wednesday on Instagram and his father had a quick response.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: VIDEO: A jet carrying the Gonzaga men's basketball team ordered to stop to avoid collision at LAX
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Federal Aviation Administration has launched an investigation after a private jet carrying the Gonzaga University men’s basketball team nearly crossed a runway as another flight was taking off Friday at Los Angeles International Airport.
item.dc:creator: STEFANIE DAZIO and JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Coby White, Torrey Craig lead the Bulls past the Hornets in overtime, 115-108
item.description: Coby White narrowly missed his first career triple-double, finishing with 23 points, 10 rebounds and nine assists, and Torrey Craig scored 18 with five 3-pointers after halftime as the Chicago Bulls held on to beat the Charlotte Hornets 115-108 in overtime Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Giddey's triple-double sends Bulls to 116-111 win over Bucks
item.description: Josh Giddey had 23 points, 15 rebounds and 10 assists for his second triple-double this season to lead the Chicago Bulls to a 116-111 win over the Milwaukee Bucks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
